title: Waxed Indicators
body:
## About
Honeycomb indicators for waxed copper items, which are only visible in the inventory.

## Two Versions

- 3x GUI Scale users - [get this version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waxed-indicators/version/3xGUI_2.1)
- 4x GUI Scale and 2x users - [get this version](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/waxed-indicators/version/4xGUI_2.1)
